title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF SAN JOSE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ABORLAN, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3994 / 57 OG No. 11, 1950 (March 13, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2873, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF SAN JOSE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ABORLAN, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Outer Apoaporawan in the Municipality of Aborlan, Province of Palawan, is converted into a barrio of said municipality, to be known as the barrio of San Jose.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
